positive: An intricate, symmetrical design featuring stylized celestial flora and geometric constellations, arranged in a deep forest tableau. The scene utilizes highly contrasting colors: deep midnight blue, electric teal, vibrant violet, and pops of glowing lime green. The flora elements should appear bioluminescent, casting ethereal light onto stylized, crystalline leaves and abstract lunar motifs. The style must be clean, sophisticated vector illustration combined with the detailed depth of scientific botanical drawings. Focus on strong, dark silhouettes against a slightly luminous background. Central composition, perfect for high-quality apparel printing. Studio lighting, maximal detail, high contrast, 8k resolution.
